'''鈭歞-th-v''' ('''kadathav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quawk|quawk]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-th-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quawk|quawk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-th-v
|-
! Lemma
| kadathav
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidathav|thidathav]] || [[word:jidathav|jidathav]] || [[word:shidathav|shidathav]] || [[word:kidathav|kidathav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudathav|thuthudathav]] || [[word:jujudathav|jujudathav]] || [[word:shushudathav|shushudathav]] || [[word:kukudathav|kukudathav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudathav|thudathav]] || [[word:judathav|judathav]] || [[word:shudathav|shudathav]] || [[word:kudathav|kudathav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudathav|thudathav]] || [[word:judathav|judathav]] || [[word:shudathav|shudathav]] || [[word:kudathav|kudathav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedathav|thedathav]] || [[word:jedathav|jedathav]] || [[word:shedathav|shedathav]] || [[word:kedathav|kedathav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodathav|thothodathav]] || [[word:jojodathav|jojodathav]] || [[word:shoshodathav|shoshodathav]] || [[word:kokodathav|kokodathav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodathav|thodathav]] || [[word:jodathav|jodathav]] || [[word:shodathav|shodathav]] || [[word:kodathav|kodathav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodathav|thodathav]] || [[word:jodathav|jodathav]] || [[word:shodathav|shodathav]] || [[word:kodathav|kodathav]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dathav|dathav]] || [[word:dathav|dathav]] || [[word:dathav|dathav]] || [[word:dathav|dathav]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dathav|dathav]] || [[word:dathav|dathav]] || [[word:dathav|dathav]] || [[word:dathav|dathav]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dathav|dathav]] || [[word:dathav|dathav]] || [[word:dathav|dathav]] || [[word:dathav|dathav]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dathav|dathav]] || [[word:dathav|dathav]] || [[word:dathav|dathav]] || [[word:dathav|dathav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dathav|th忙dathav]] || [[word:j忙dathav|j忙dathav]] || [[word:sh忙dathav|sh忙dathav]] || [[word:k忙dathav|k忙dathav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadathav|thathadathav]] || [[word:jajadathav|jajadathav]] || [[word:shashadathav|shashadathav]] || [[word:kakadathav|kakadathav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadathav|thadathav]] || [[word:jadathav|jadathav]] || [[word:shadathav|shadathav]] || [[word:kadathav|kadathav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadathav|thadathav]] || [[word:jadathav|jadathav]] || [[word:shadathav|shadathav]] || [[word:kadathav|kadathav]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadathav|shadathav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadathav|goshadathav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadathav|gokishadathav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadathavn眉|shadathavn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadathavnkn眉|goshadathavnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadathavn眉|gokishadathavn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadathavsh毛|shadathavsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadathavnksh毛|goshadathavnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadathavsh毛|gokishadathavsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadathavro|shadathavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadathavnkro|goshadathavnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadathavro|gokishadathavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadathavmu|shadathavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadathavnkmu|goshadathavnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadathavmu|gokishadathavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadathavsher|shadathavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadathavnksher|goshadathavnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadathavsher|gokishadathavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadathavng|shadathavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadathavnkng|goshadathavnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadathavng|gokishadathavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadathavya|shadathavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadathavnkya|goshadathavnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadathavya|gokishadathavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadathavyam|shadathavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadathavnkyam|goshadathavnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadathavyam|gokishadathavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadathavn眉sh毛|shadathavn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadathavnkn眉sh毛|goshadathavnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadathavn眉sh毛|gokishadathavn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadathavn眉ro|shadathavn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadathavnkn眉ro|goshadathavnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadathavn眉ro|gokishadathavn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadathavn眉mu|shadathavn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadathavnkn眉mu|goshadathavnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadathavn眉mu|gokishadathavn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadathavsh毛n眉|shadathavsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadathavnksh毛n眉|goshadathavnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadathavsh毛n眉|gokishadathavsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadathavsh毛ro|shadathavsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadathavnksh毛ro|goshadathavnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadathavsh毛ro|gokishadathavsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadathavsh毛mu|shadathavsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadathavnksh毛mu|goshadathavnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadathavsh毛mu|gokishadathavsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadathavron眉|shadathavron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadathavnkron眉|goshadathavnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadathavron眉|gokishadathavron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadathavrosh毛|shadathavrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadathavnkrosh毛|goshadathavnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadathavrosh毛|gokishadathavrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadathavromu|shadathavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadathavnkromu|goshadathavnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadathavromu|gokishadathavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadathavmun眉|shadathavmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadathavnkmun眉|goshadathavnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadathavmun眉|gokishadathavmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadathavmush毛|shadathavmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadathavnkmush毛|goshadathavnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadathavmush毛|gokishadathavmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadathavmuro|shadathavmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadathavnkmuro|goshadathavnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadathavmuro|gokishadathavmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
